# sentry_alert (Data Source)

⚠️ This resource is currently in beta and may be subject to change. It is supported by [New Monitors and Alerts](https://docs.sentry.io/product/new-monitors-and-alerts/) and may not be viewable in the UI today.

Retrieve an Alert for a Monitor in an Organization.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The internal ID of the alert.
- `organization` (String) The organization slug or internal ID of the alert.

### Read-Only

- `action_filters_json` (String) The filters to run before the action will fire and the action(s) to fire.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the alert is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `environment` (String) Name of the environment for this alert.
- `frequency_minutes` (Number) How often the alert should fire in minutes.
- `monitor_ids` (Set of String) The IDs of the monitors for this alert.
- `name` (String) The name of this alert.
- `triggers_json` (String) The triggers for this alert.
